cover.subtitle:
넥타이 부대가 외친
호헌 철폐, 독재 타도.
cover.imagePrompt: Contemporary Korean minimal illustration. Gray, red, blue simple palette. Suits, military uniforms, civilian clothing. Gwanghwamun, National Assembly, democracy plaza background. CENTER: a wide crowd of office workers in 1980s suits with loosened neckties and students in school uniforms, raising fists together on a wide downtown Seoul plaza. Above: a single white dove silhouette flying upward. Background: tall low-rise concrete buildings. Color palette: gray + navy + a single crimson dove silhouette accent. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_headline:
"박종철 1월 · 이한열 6월"
두 청년의 이름을 외울 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 4·13 호헌 선언과 6·29 선언의 주체 구분, 9차 개헌의 핵심(5년 단임·직선제), 6·10 국민대회 구호가 자주 출제된다.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small silhouette of a single raised fist and a dove (no readable text). Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
